top_signals.title: Teens held over Tochigi robbery-murders met alleged masterminds on day of crime
top_signals.summary: In collusion with the couple, the four boys are suspected of having broken into a house Thursday morning and stabbed a 69-year-old woman to death, also attacking her sons.
